Professional Concrete Services

Durable Concrete Solutions for Every Project

Expert concrete construction and repair services in Central Ohio since 1999. From residential driveways and patios to commercial foundations and decorative finishes — we deliver lasting quality with precision craftsmanship. Licensed, insured, and committed to excellence on every pour.

26+ Years Experience
1,800+ Projects Completed
4.5★ Google Rating
Get Free Estimate Call (740) 453-3063
Comprehensive Concrete Services

Our Concrete Solutions

Full-service concrete construction, repair, and finishing for residential and commercial properties.

01

Concrete Driveways

Professional concrete driveway installation with reinforced construction, proper drainage, and premium finishing for long-lasting durability and curb appeal.

  • Complete excavation & grading
  • Compacted gravel base
  • Rebar or wire mesh reinforcement
  • 4-6" concrete thickness
  • Control joints & proper drainage
  • Broom, smooth, or decorative finish
$8.50per sq ft · standard 4" thickness
Get Estimate
02

Patios & Outdoor Living

Custom concrete patios, outdoor kitchens, fire pit areas, and entertainment spaces designed to extend your living area outdoors.

  • Custom design & layout
  • Stamped concrete patterns
  • Colored & stained finishes
  • Integrated seating & planters
  • Fire pit & grill pads
  • Pool deck construction
$9.50per sq ft · decorative options
Get Estimate
03

Walkways & Sidewalks

Durable concrete walkways, garden paths, and sidewalks with design flexibility and ADA-compliant accessibility options.

  • Front entry walkways
  • Garden & landscape paths
  • Public sidewalk installation
  • ADA-compliant ramps
  • Decorative borders & accents
  • Integral or stamped patterns
$7.50per sq ft · standard walkways
Get Estimate
04

Foundation Work

Structural foundation installation and repair for residential and light commercial buildings with proper engineering and waterproofing.

  • New foundation installation
  • Foundation crack repair
  • Waterproofing & drainage
  • Garage & shed slabs
  • Crawl space floors
  • Settlement & leveling
Custom Quoteproject-specific pricing
Get Estimate
05

Decorative Concrete

Transform ordinary concrete into stunning visual features with stamped patterns, colored finishes, exposed aggregate, and custom designs.

  • Stamped concrete (stone, brick, tile)
  • Acid stain & integral color
  • Exposed aggregate finish
  • Polished concrete
  • Engraved patterns & logos
  • Epoxy coatings & sealers
$11.00per sq ft · stamped/decorative
Get Estimate
06

Concrete Repair

Expert repair of damaged, cracked, or deteriorating concrete to restore structural integrity and extend service life.

  • Crack repair & injection
  • Spalling & scaling repair
  • Slab leveling (mudjacking)
  • Joint sealing & replacement
  • Surface restoration
  • Concrete resurfacing
From $500minimum service charge
Get Estimate
The Neff Advantage

Why Choose Neff for Concrete Work

Trusted concrete expertise backed by 26 years of proven performance in Central Ohio.

Concrete Specialists

26+ years of concrete expertise — from basic slabs to complex decorative work. We know concrete inside and out.

Premium Materials

We use only high-strength concrete mixes with proper PSI ratings and quality aggregates for maximum durability.

Proper Reinforcement

Every project includes appropriate reinforcement — rebar, wire mesh, or fiber — engineered for your specific application.

Licensed & Insured

Fully licensed, insured, and compliant with local building codes. Your investment is protected.

Design Expertise

From traditional finishes to decorative stamped patterns — we help you choose the perfect look for your property.

Transparent Pricing

Detailed written estimates with clear pricing — no hidden fees, no surprises. Free on-site consultations.

Simple & Professional

Our Concrete Construction Process

From consultation to curing — a proven process for exceptional concrete work.

1

Free Consultation

We visit your property to assess the project, discuss design options, and take precise measurements.

2

Detailed Estimate

Receive a comprehensive quote covering materials, labor, timeline, and finishing options.

3

Site Preparation

Professional excavation, grading, base installation, and formwork to exact specifications.

4

Concrete Pour & Finish

Expert concrete placement with proper reinforcement, finishing techniques, and control joints.

5

Curing & Sealing

Proper curing procedures and optional sealing to ensure maximum strength and longevity.

Ready to Build with Concrete?

Start Your Concrete Project Today

Join hundreds of satisfied Central Ohio property owners who trust Neff Paving for professional concrete construction. Get your free, detailed estimate today.

✓ Free on-site consultations
✓ Premium materials & reinforcement
✓ Expert finishing & design
✓ Licensed & insured
